title: drimia rotunda
intro: Drimia rotunda, also known as the Drimia maritima or sea squill, is a bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region and South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. Drimia rotunda is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Drimia rotunda can be made into tinctures, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to treat conditions like bronchitis, coughs, and asthma.
